steps: Go to https://secure.helpscout.net and log in to your Help Scout account
Click your profile avatar in the top-right corner and select 'Your Profile'
In the left sidebar, click 'My Apps'
Fill in the app name and a redirect URL (e.g., https://yourdomain.com/oauth/callback)
Click 'Create' to generate your OAuth credentials
Copy the App ID (client_id) and App Secret (client_secret) shown on the app detail page

credential_fields.name: client_id
credential_fields.label: App ID (Client ID)
credential_fields.description: The App ID generated when you create an OAuth app in Help Scout

credential_fields.name: client_secret
credential_fields.label: App Secret (Client Secret)
credential_fields.description: The App Secret generated when you create an OAuth app in Help Scout

notes: Help Scout uses OAuth2 client credentials flow for server-to-server API access
Access tokens expire after 2 hours and must be refreshed using the client credentials grant
Token endpoint: POST https://api.helpscout.net/v2/oauth2/token with grant_type=client_credentials
The redirect URL is required when creating the app but only used for Authorization Code flow
All Help Scout plans include API access

test_endpoint.description: Retrieve the currently authenticated user to verify credentials
